notes: Pickleheads lists exactly 4 Daly City locations totaling 16 courts (War Memorial Community Center 3, Bay Club South San Francisco 6, Gellert Park 2, Pacelli Event Center 5 [2 outdoor + 3 indoor] = 16, internally consistent with its own stated total). Daly City has zero existing entries anywhere in this site (courts-data.json, venues.json, regions.js, cities/) prior to this research, so every venue below is new and there is nothing to list in notOnPickleheads. dalycity.org has no single consolidated pickleball-courts page; pickleball surfaces there only via the Athletics program page (dalycity.org/339/Athletics, which points to the City's ActiveCommunities/iplay registration system for live open-gym schedules) and the City's FY2027 Master Fee Schedule (dalycity.org/DocumentCenter/View/11314), which lists a citywide 'Open Gym Drop-In (Various Sports)' fee of $6.00 resident/$7.50 non-resident and a separate 'Court Reservation (Badminton/Pickleball)' fee of $20 resident/$25 non-resident per session -- these read as two different products (casual drop-in vs. formally reserving a court outright), and third-party aggregators disagree with each other and with this fee schedule on which applies where and how much -- see each venue's price/notes. The single biggest reconciliation call in this file: Pickleheads' 'Pacelli Event Center' listing (145 Lake Merced Blvd; 5 courts, 2 outdoor + 3 indoor; free; bring-your-own net) and a separate aggregator's 'Westlake Park Community Center' listing (identical address; 3 indoor courts; nets provided; $4/session) are, per the City's own ActiveCommunities facility system (facility_id=82, official name 'WLCC - Pacelli Gym - Westlake Park') and a third-party events site's explicit 'aka' naming, almost certainly the SAME physical gym under two names in circulation. Merged here into one record, 'Westlake Park Community Center (Pacelli Gym)', rather than listed twice -- confirmed:false because the underlying court-count/indoor-outdoor conflict between Pickleheads and the other sources is unresolved; see that venue's notes for the full reasoning. A fifth venue, Bayshore Community Center (450 Martin St), turned up only through the City's own ActiveCommunities system and a local 'Bayshore Pickleball Club' Facebook page (70+ members, 5+ years) -- it is not on Pickleheads, PicklePlay, or any other aggregator checked, and no source states a court count, so it is included with confirmed:false as the thinnest-sourced entry in this file rather than omitted. Google Maps cid values for Bay Club South San Francisco, Gellert Park, Westlake Park Community Center, and Bayshore Community Center were derived by converting the hex feature id embedded in a live Google Maps place URL surfaced via search into decimal, then cross-checked against independently-geocoded coordinates for the same address -- not pulled from a first-party API, so a human should click through and spot-check each before fully trusting it. No numeric cid could be found for War Memorial Community Center; its googleMapsUrl is left null rather than falling back to a place_id or /maps/place/ URL.

venues.name: War Memorial Community Center
venues.surface: Indoor wood-floor gym courts, permanent lines, portable nets (3 courts)
venues.price: Pickleheads and other pickleball-specific aggregators (Pickleballify, Bounce, PlayPickleball) state free. The City's FY2027 Master Fee Schedule separately lists a citywide Open Gym Drop-In fee of $6.00 resident/$7.50 non-resident and a Court Reservation (Badminton/Pickleball) fee of $20 resident/$25 non-resident per session; a Daly City Recreation Facebook post cited a $4.00 drop-in fee for its Wednesday session specifically. These may reflect different products (free/casual open-gym time vs. a paid formal reservation) or a fee that changed over time -- confirm before visiting.
venues.hours: Multiple weekly Open Gym pickleball sessions; schedule appears to rotate seasonally. Aggregator scheduling data shows Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm; a Daly City Recreation Facebook post separately advertised a Wednesday 7-9pm session (Upper Gym) co-hosted with Golden Gate Pickleball Club; the City's ActiveCommunities system also references a 'SUN Pickleball WNTR -- WMCC' (winter Sunday) program. Building hours: weekdays roughly 10am-6pm (Wednesday until 8pm per one source), Saturday 9am-1pm, Sunday 9am-5pm. Confirm the live schedule via the iplay activity calendar before visiting.
venues.weather: Daly City sits directly in the San Bruno Gap, the low coastal notch that channels the summer marine layer in off the Pacific on strong, steady westerly winds -- fog and wind are typical mornings and evenings even in July, with at best a few hours of hazy midday sun; bring a windbreaker regardless of season.
venues.notes: 6655 Mission St sits in Daly City's 'Top of the Hill' area (per geocoding). Well corroborated across 5+ independent pickleball-specific sources (Pickleheads, Pickleballify, Bounce, PlayPickleball, Places2Play) all agreeing on 3 indoor wood courts -- confirmed:true. One unrelated search synthesis briefly claimed '6 courts, all indoors' for this venue; that conflicts with every other source checked (all say 3) and reads like a cross-contamination artifact (possibly confusing this venue with Bay Club's 6-court count), so it was discarded rather than recorded as a genuine conflict. No numeric Google Maps cid could be confirmed for this specific address despite multiple attempts, so googleMapsUrl is left null rather than falling back to a place_id or /maps/place/ URL.

venues.name: Gellert Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court. The City's own facility system names this 'Gellert Park - Tennis Court #1' (part of a multi-court tennis facility, reported elsewhere as 4 lighted tennis courts); Pickleheads independently describes 2 of these as dedicated outdoor pickleball courts with permanent lines and nets. The City's own listing does not mention pickleball at all for this location.
venues.netType: Dedicated permanent pickleball nets (per Pickleheads); the official city listing frames the facility as tennis courts and does not independently describe a pickleball-specific net setup
venues.price: Free (per Pickleheads); no separate fee for this location appears in the City's FY2027 Master Fee Schedule
venues.hours: 7am-6pm daily, per the City's official Tennis Court #1 facility listing. Pickleheads does not separately state pickleball-specific hours.
venues.weather: Daly City sits directly in the San Bruno Gap, the low coastal notch that channels the summer marine layer in off the Pacific on strong, steady westerly winds -- fog and wind are typical mornings and evenings even in July, with at best a few hours of hazy midday sun; bring a windbreaker regardless of season.
venues.notes: Gellert Park is a 20+-acre Daly City park in the Serramonte neighborhood (beside the Serramonte branch library) with a separately-bookable clubhouse (dalycity.org/1096) and, per the City's own ActiveCommunities system, at least one numbered tennis court (facility_id=17, 'Gellert Park - Tennis Court #1'; other sources describe 4 lighted tennis courts total at the park). Pickleheads and several pickleball-specific aggregators (Branded Pickleball, TennisPickleballCalifornia, Atly) all list 'Gellert Park' or 'Gellert Park Tennis Courts' as a place to play pickleball, converging on 2 outdoor hard courts with dedicated lines/nets -- but the City's own official facility page for this court never mentions pickleball at all, describing it purely as a reservable tennis court (7-day advance reservation required, 7am-6pm). This is a real gap between the PRIMARY source (silent on pickleball here) and multiple secondary pickleball-specific aggregators (confident it's a pickleball spot) -- most plausibly explained by informal/unstriped shared play on the tennis courts that the City hasn't formally documented as a pickleball amenity, but left confirmed:false rather than guessing which is right. Address corroborated at 50 Wembley Dr, Daly City, CA 94015 via the City's own facility page (one non-official aggregator synthesis said zip 94016; not used). Amenities (restrooms, parking, playground) are park-wide per city and aggregator descriptions, not confirmed as specific to the tennis/pickleball court area itself. Google Maps cid (5430505041195094440) came directly from a search result for 'Gellert Park - 50 Wembley Dr, Daly City, CA 94015' -- no hex conversion needed, but still only search-sourced rather than API-confirmed.

venues.name: Bay Club South San Francisco
venues.surface: Indoor hard court, dedicated pickleball courts within a 90,000+ sq ft tennis & pickleball facility
venues.price: Membership required. Per Bay Club's own FAQ, pickleball carries no additional per-session court fee for members (tennis at this location does have separate court fees). Membership dues are not published; bayclubs.com directs prospective members to an online membership builder (join.bayclubs.com) or to call the club directly.
venues.notes: Despite being named 'South San Francisco,' this club's address (501 Carter St) is in Daly City, near the Cow Palace -- confirmed via three independent coordinate lookups (two geocodes plus a Google Maps place result) all converging on approximately 37.708, -122.423, which Nominatim explicitly resolves to Daly City, CA 94014 (as distinct from a similarly-styled San Francisco address about 350 feet away that a naive search could confuse it with -- checked and ruled out). Court count of 6 indoor hard courts is corroborated by 3 independent pickleball-specific aggregators (Pickleheads, PlayPickleball, CourtSource) though not spelled out in those exact terms on bayclubs.com's own pages (which describe the shared 90,000 sq ft tennis-and-pickleball complex, separately citing 12 tennis courts, without breaking out a pickleball-specific number) -- treated as confirmed given 3-source aggregator agreement plus the parent company's own confirmation that indoor pickleball is offered at this location. Google Maps cid (15311412520201909624) was derived by converting the hex feature id from a Google Maps place URL found via search (result title read 'Bay Club South San Francisco · 501 Carter St, Daly City, CA 94014' though the URL slug itself said 'Bay Club SF Tennis' -- likely a legacy/internal slug rather than a different venue, given the matching address, title, and coordinates) -- a human should click through and spot-check before fully trusting it.

venues.name: Westlake Park Community Center (Pacelli Gym)
venues.address: 145 Lake Merced Blvd, Daly City, CA 94015
venues.surface: Indoor gym courts (hard floor), permanent lines. Pickleheads' 'Pacelli Event Center' listing for this same address describes a different configuration -- 5 total courts (2 outdoor + 3 indoor), hard/asphalt, bring-your-own net -- materially inconsistent with the single indoor-gym framing used everywhere else (see notes).
venues.netType: Not specified -- conflicting: PicklePlay/PickleballRush say portable nets are provided on-site; Pickleheads' Pacelli Event Center listing says bring-your-own net
venues.price: PicklePlay states a flat $4/session; the City's FY2027 Master Fee Schedule lists a citywide Open Gym Drop-In fee of $6.00 resident/$7.50 non-resident and a separate Court Reservation (Badminton/Pickleball) fee of $20 resident/$25 non-resident per session; Pickleheads' Pacelli Event Center listing says simply free. Three different figures across three source lineages -- confirm the current fee before visiting.
venues.hours: PicklePlay reports pickleball Tuesday/Thursday 11am-2pm ($4, contact Terry Chew, 650-270-9028); a separate search pass found badminton (a different program) at this same gym on Sundays 2-5pm. Building/rental hours per the City's official facility page: Sun-Thu 7am-11pm, Fri 7am-midnight, Sat 7am-11:59pm. Confirm current pickleball-specific hours via the iplay activity calendar.
venues.notes: This record merges two names that independent research strongly indicates are the SAME physical gym: Pickleheads calls it 'Pacelli Event Center'; a separate pickleball aggregator (PicklePlay) and Yelp call it 'Westlake Park Community Center'; still others (PickleballRush, Pickleball Near Me) call it 'Pacelli Gym Westlake Community Center'. All variants share the identical address, 145 Lake Merced Blvd, Daly City, CA 94015. The City's own ActiveCommunities facility system lists exactly one bookable facility at this address for this purpose -- facility_id=82, official name 'WLCC - Pacelli Gym - Westlake Park' -- and a third-party events-listing site (Eventsfy) explicitly titles it 'Westlake Park Pacelli Event Center aka Westlake Park Gym'. Given one official facility record (not two) plus an explicit 'aka', this file treats it as one venue rather than two, named here 'Westlake Park Community Center (Pacelli Gym)' to preserve both names in circulation. However, Pickleheads' own court count/configuration for 'Pacelli Event Center' (5 total: 2 outdoor + 3 indoor, BYO net) is materially different from the 3-indoor-court, nets-provided version reported independently by 3 other aggregators (PicklePlay, PickleballRush, Pickleball Near Me) and implied by the City's own 'Gym' framing (an indoor multipurpose room, capacity 588, used for both athletics and private event rentals -- no outdoor component mentioned anywhere in the official record). This file's structured fields (courts:3, indoorOutdoor:Indoor) follow the majority/official-consistent version rather than Pickleheads' own figure; confirmed is set to false specifically because of this unresolved conflict, and a human should check pickleheads.com/courts/us/california/daly-city/pacelli-event-center directly to see whether Pickleheads' 2-outdoor-court claim reflects a real recent addition to the site that other sources haven't caught up to, or a data error. Google Maps cid (9223660457241710107) is an address-level pin for '145 Lake Merced Blvd, Daly City, CA 94015' generally (derived from a hex feature id in a Google Maps URL found via search), not a business-specific listing -- reasonable given the address match but worth a human sanity-check.

venues.name: Bayshore Community Center
venues.surface: Indoor gym court(s); exact playing surface material not stated in any source found
venues.price: Not independently confirmed for this location. The City's FY2027 Master Fee Schedule lists a citywide Open Gym Drop-In fee of $6.00 resident/$7.50 non-resident that would presumably apply here as it does at the City's other gyms, but no source explicitly states Bayshore charges this.
venues.hours: Badminton/Pickleball open gym reported Monday 8:30am-2:00pm, Tuesday 8:30-11:30am, Wednesday 8:30am-1:00pm, Thursday 8:30-11:30am, Friday 8:30am-2:00pm (via the City's iplay/ActiveCommunities system). General building hours reported separately as Mon-Fri 8:30am-4:00pm (Tuesday/Thursday until 10pm), Saturday 9am-2pm -- some inconsistency between these two hour-sets; confirm directly.
venues.notes: Not listed on Pickleheads, PicklePlay, or any other pickleball-specific aggregator checked -- found only by searching the City's own ActiveCommunities/iplay system directly (an 'Open Gym (Drop In) - Basketball - Bayshore Gym' program entry, plus a separately-surfaced Badminton/Pickleball weekday schedule tied to the same system) and, independently, a community Facebook page for 'Bayshore Pickleball Club' describing itself as 5+ years old with 70+ members playing 'on the courts at Bayshore' (facebook.com/bayshorepickleballclub) -- a genuinely independent, non-aggregator confirmation that organized pickleball happens here. This is the thinnest-sourced entry in this file: no source states a court count, playing surface, net type, or lights, so those fields are left Not specified/null rather than assumed from War Memorial's or Pacelli's figures. Address (450 Martin St, Daly City, CA 94014, in the Bayshore Heights neighborhood) is well corroborated across many general-purpose sources (Yelp, Waze, Apple Maps, Chamber of Commerce). A human should call the center directly (650-991-5701 per multiple listings, or 650-991-8001 for the Recreation Dept. general line) to confirm court count and current fees before this venue is published with full confidence. Google Maps cid (16875807106428527446) was derived by converting the hex feature id from a Google Maps place URL found via search titled 'Bayshore Community Center · 450 Martin St, Daly City, CA 94014' -- a human should click through and spot-check.
